luxury-relaxation.title: Customized Bali Tours for Your Perfect Holiday!

packages.name: The Premium Package - Luxury Relaxation
packages.overview: Enjoy the luxury of Bali with a stay at a 5-star resort in Nusa Dua. This package is designed for travelers who want to relax and experience Bali's beauty in premium style.

itinerary.title: Arrival
activities: Private airport transfer to Nusa Dua resort
Hotel orientation

itinerary.title: Leisure at the resort
activities: Morning yoga by the beach
Half-day Balinese spa ritual
Fine dining dinner at your resort

itinerary.title: Culture & Elegance
activities: Visit Uluwatu Temple with Kecak dance performance
Gourmet seafood dinner overlooking the cliffs

itinerary.title: Ubud Day Trip
activities: Private tour to Ubud: Monkey Forest, Tegallalang Rice Terraces
Lunch at a riverside restaurant
Evening return to Nusa Dua for relaxation

itinerary.title: Island Escape
activities: Luxury catamaran cruise to Nusa Penida or Lembongan
Snorkeling & beach picnic
Farewell dinner with Balinese cultural show

itinerary.title: Departure
activities: Leisure breakfast
Departure

packages.name: Premium Package with 5 night stay at Kuta or Seminyak
packages.overview: A perfect combination of Bali adventure and culture.
highlights: Water sports: jet ski, parasailing, banana boat

itinerary.title: Arrival & Relaxation
activities: Airport pickup and transfer to your hotel
Check-in and unwind with a traditional Balinese massage

itinerary.title: Water Sports Day
activities: Jet ski, parasailing, banana boat rides in Tanjung Benoa
Afternoon free time
Dinner at a local seafood restaurant

itinerary.title: Ubud Adventure
activities: White-water rafting on Ayung River
Visit Ubud Art Market & Monkey Forest
Dinner in Ubud before returning to hotel

itinerary.title: Volcano & Culture
activities: Sunrise trek at Mount Batur
Hot spring soak afterward
Afternoon visit to Tirta Empul Temple

itinerary.title: Island Adventure
activities: Speedboat to Nusa Penida
Explore Kelingking Beach, Broken Beach, Angel's Billabong
Snorkeling with manta rays
Return for farewell dinner

itinerary.title: Departure
activities: Breakfast & private transfer to airport

packages.name: Three night stay Package at Seminyak or Kuta Area
packages.overview: A short weekend escape package for an unforgettable Bali getaway.
highlights: Sunset at Uluwatu with Kecak Dance

itinerary.title: Arrival & Relaxation
activities: Airport pickup and transfer to your hotel
Check-in and unwind with a traditional Balinese massage
Evening: Sunset at Uluwatu with Kecak Dance show followed by welcome dinner

itinerary.title: Culture & Temples
activities: Morning visit to Ubud Monkey Forest and Ubud Palace
Explore Tegallalang Rice Terraces
Afternoon: Tirta Empul Temple for spiritual cleansing ritual
Evening dinner at Ubud area

itinerary.title: Adventure & Nature
activities: Early morning trip to Mount Batur for sunrise trekking
Breakfast overlooking Lake Batur
Visit a coffee plantation to taste Luwak coffee
Afternoon: Relax at Tegenungan Waterfall
Evening: Free time for shopping or spa

itinerary.title: Departure
activities: Leisurely breakfast at the hotel
Free time for last-minute shopping or beach stroll
Transfer to airport for departure

included: Entrance fees for all tourist attractions

packages.name: Adventure & Culture Combo
packages.overview: An adventure and culture package for active travelers.

packages.name: Weekend Getaway Bali
packages.overview: A short weekend getaway in Bali.
